RCSB title: STRUCTURE OF TOBACCO RINGSPOT VIRUS. Entity description: TOBACCO RINGSPOT VIRUS CAPSID PROTEIN. Entry keywords: VIRUS TRSV, NEPOVIRUS, VIRUS STRUCTURE, VIRUS EVOLUTION, PICORNAVIRUS SUPERFAMILY, VIRUS CAPSID PROTEIN, Icosahedral virus, Virus. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
